# Shashwat Tripathi — Frontend Engineer

> Frontend engineer who's shipped 9+ production products with top Web3 and AI
> teams. Currently frontend consultant at ShopOS, an AI-native commerce
> platform. Previously led frontend at Dehidden across DeFi platforms, NFT
> minting (1M+ users, 100K mints day one), and AI x Web3 launches with
> Coinbase, Polygon, and Sentient.

## Quick links

- Site: https://www.shashwa7.in/
- Contact: contact@shashwa7.in
- GitHub: https://github.com/shashwa7-dev

## Discovery

- Sitemap: https://www.shashwa7.in/sitemap.xml
- RSS feed: https://www.shashwa7.in/rss
- Web manifest: https://www.shashwa7.in/manifest.webmanifest

## Content negotiation

Pages with markdown source return `text/markdown` when requested with
`Accept: text/markdown`:

- Blog posts: `/blogs/<slug>` (e.g. https://www.shashwa7.in/blogs/truffy-agent)
- Work diaries: `/work/<org>/log` (e.g. https://www.shashwa7.in/work/shopos/log)

Other pages return their default HTML representation regardless of Accept.

## What you'll find

- `/` — homepage, includes hero, experience, projects, books, clients.
- `/work/<org>` — overview of a role + projects shipped there.
- `/work/<org>/log` — long-form contributions log ("diary") for that role.
- `/work/<org>/<project>` — individual project case study.
- `/blogs` — index of writing.
- `/blogs/<slug>` — individual post.
- `/projects` — independent / side projects.
- `/books` — reading list with notes.
- `/design` — design-system reference page.

## Content usage preferences

See `https://www.shashwa7.in/robots.txt` for `Content-Signal` declarations.
Summary: search yes, agent at-read yes, AI training no.
